global_description: Succulent plant with thick, fleshy stems, often cylindrical or spherical, covered in spines. Typically green with a waxy texture, adapted to arid environments. May have small flowers or fruit.

part_details.stems: Thick, fleshy, cylindrical or spherical, green with waxy surface
part_details.flowers: Small, often colorful, emerging from the stem
part_details.fruit: Small, sometimes colorful, developing from flowers

spatial_relations: Spines cover the surface of stems
Flowers emerge from the top or sides of stems
